overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing a nighttime walk through a neon-lit urban commercial district. The player character navigates a busy street corner with futuristic vehicles and holographic advertisements, transitioning from observing the intersection to walking along a covered sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy urban intersection with holographic billboards

events.description: camera pans left to view traffic and neon signs up the street
camera pans back right to face the crosswalk and corner building

agents.ego_description: standing at the crosswalk, looking around the intersection at the neon signs and passing traffic

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan driving through the intersection
group of pedestrians waiting at the corner near the crosswalk

entered.detail: massive curved digital screen displaying advertisements with red and purple coloring on the corner building
building with traditional Asian architectural elements and red paper lanterns
metal security fence with diamond pattern
overhead walkway with bright blue neon lighting
floating digital billboards and signs extending down the street

segments.scene_description: Standing at a neon-lit intersection in Night City, the camera pans across a bustling urban scene. A massive red digital billboard dominates the corner building while futuristic vehicles drive through the intersection and pedestrians wait at the crosswalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under elevated transit structure

events.description: begins walking forward across the crosswalk
steps onto sidewalk and enters covered walkway beneath elevated structure
moves deeper under the overpass where lighting becomes darker with accent neon

agents.ego_description: crossing the street and walking along the sidewalk under the elevated structure, passing by pedestrians and street furniture

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking along the sidewalk in the same direction

entered.detail: building entrance with pagoda-style roof and glowing red lanterns
massive structural columns supporting the overhead roadway
red automated vending machines against the wall
concrete seating areas along the walkway

segments.scene_description: Moving from the open intersection into a covered walkway beneath an elevated transit structure. The environment shifts from open sky to a sheltered corridor with concrete pillars, vending machines, and traditional Asian architectural details on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian promenade with seating and neon advertising

events.description: camera perspective shifts to third-person revealing the player character with red hair
passes by a group of NPCs seated in a plaza area

agents.ego_description: continuing down the covered walkway in third-person view, following the character with red hair through a moderately crowded pedestrian area

notable_agents.action: player character with red hair and dark clothing walking forward
group of NPCs sitting on benches and conversing

entered.detail: tall cylindrical structure displaying multiple rotating digital advertisements
open plaza space with circular benches where NPCs are gathered
concrete parking garage with multiple visible levels and neon signage

segments.scene_description: The perspective shifts to third-person following a character with red hair through a moderately crowded pedestrian promenade. The walkway features seating areas with NPCs, holographic advertising pillars, and opens up to reveal a multi-level parking structure on the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a wide, neon-lit urban intersection into a sheltered pedestrian promenade. It begins by panning across a bustling street corner dominated by a massive red digital billboard and futuristic vehicles passing through the intersection. As the camera moves away from the open sky, the environment shifts into a covered walkway beneath an elevated transit structure, passing concrete pillars and vending machines accented with traditional Asian architectural details. The perspective then shifts to a third-person view following a red-haired character through a crowded promenade filled with holographic advertising pillars and seating areas. The scene finally opens up to reveal a multi-level parking structure on the right as the character continues their walk.
